summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Wealth Command UX improvements (Iteration 50). All 32 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new pages load correctly with consistent left navigation, Buy/Sell buttons work on shares, AI Insights are inline with action buttons, and Compliance page shows client-level checks.

issues: Disclaimer modal appears on every page navigation - consider showing only once per session or adding 'Don't show again' option. The modal requires checkbox acknowledgement which is good for compliance but may be annoying for returning users.

critical_code_review_comments: All new pages (ClientWealth, AIInsights, ClientCompliance) use Layout component for consistent left navigation
Buy/Sell buttons properly implemented with TransactionDialog component
AI Insights displayed inline with action buttons (View Client, Run Scenario, Schedule Review)
Compliance page shows client-level checks with pass/fail status
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 pages load correctly with expected functionality)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX improvements working correctly. Key pages tested: /client-wealth (with Buy/Sell buttons for shares), /client-insights (inline AI insights with action buttons), /compliance (client-level compliance checks). All pages use Layout component for consistent left sidebar navigation. Disclaimer modal appears on each page load - stored in localStorage with keys 'wheeler_compliance_acknowledged' and 'halcyon_compliance_v2'.

mocked_apis.AI_Features: REAL - Using Emergent LLM Key for AI Copilot

api_test_results.POST /api/compliance/check: PASS - Returns compliance check results with 100% score
api_test_results.GET /api/compliance/dashboard: PASS - Returns compliance overview with 93.3% rate
api_test_results.GET /api/aggregation/institutions: PASS - Returns Australian banks and super funds

frontend_test_results./client-insights: PASS - Page loads with Today's AI Insights (16 total), inline display with action buttons (View Client, Run Scenario, Schedule Review), data-testid='ai-insights-page'
frontend_test_results./compliance: PASS - Page loads with Compliance Center, Client Compliance Score 100%, tabs for Compliance Checks/Upcoming Reviews/Activity Log
frontend_test_results./dashboard: PASS - Page loads with Financial Command Center, left sidebar navigation present
